parameters.window_note: Strict 72h window (Jun 4-7) yielded 5 verified items; expanded to 5 days (Jun 2-7) per skill signal-density protocol.

items.title: OpenAI Codex adds Sites, six role-specific plugins, and 62 business-app integrations
items.source_note: HTTP 403; confirmed via TechCrunch, Axios, VentureBeat

key_claims.claim: 62 business apps, 110 automated skills across 6 role plugins

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex reach AWS Bedrock general availability

key_claims.claim: GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4, and Codex GA on Amazon Bedrock (commercial and GovCloud)

items.title: ChatGPT Dreaming V3 replaces saved-memory lists with background synthesis
items.source_note: HTTP 403; confirmed via 9to5Mac (Jun 4), TechTimes (Jun 5), Windows News (Jun 5)

key_claims.claim: ~5x compute cost reduction enabling Free tier expansion
82.8% factual recall, 71.3% preference adherence, 75.1% time-sensitive accuracy
key_claims.source: OpenAI internal evaluation, not independently replicated

items.title: OpenAI Lockdown Mode disables ChatGPT tool access to defend against prompt injection
items.source_note: HTTP 403; confirmed via TechCrunch (Jun 6), The Hacker News (Jun 4)

key_claims.claim: Available on all personal accounts (Free, Go, Plus, Pro) and self-serve Business

items.title: Claude Code v2.1.166 severs cross-session authority to harden multi-agent security

key_claims.claim: SendMessage messages from other Claude sessions no longer carry user authority

items.title: Microsoft launches 7-model MAI family at Build 2026, trained independently from OpenAI

key_claims.claim: Training included proprietary web crawl (~1.2T pages) and Common Crawl
key_claims.source: Simon Willison review (T2) — contradicts Microsoft marketing framing

conflicts.claim: MAI-Thinking-1 preferred to Sonnet 4.6 in blind evaluations
conflicts.note: Microsoft-run evaluation only; no independent replication

conflicts.claim: Trained on clean, commercially licensed data
conflicts.resolution: Willison confirmed Common Crawl and proprietary web crawl included; Microsoft framing was overstated

items.title: Anthropic expands Project Glasswing to 150 organizations covering power, water, and healthcare
items.coi: Anthropic is sole source on program scale and outcomes

key_claims.claim: Initial cohort uncovered 10,000+ high/critical severity flaws
key_claims.source: Anthropic-claimed; COI noted; no independent audit

items.title: White House EO on AI promotes innovation and creates voluntary frontier model access framework

key_claims.claim: 30-day deadline for CISA AI cyber defense guidance
60-day classified benchmarking process for covered frontier models
No mandatory licensing, preclearance, or permitting requirements

items.title: Great American AI Act draft proposes 3-year federal preemption of state AI laws
items.source_note: HTTP 403; confirmed via FedScoop (T2), Roll Call (T2)

key_claims.claim: 3-year preemption of state AI model development laws
>$500M revenue threshold for large frontier developers
$300M for CAISI over 3 years; 6-month mandatory audits for large frontier developers

items.title: OpenAI expands ChatGPT advertising to UK Free and Go users

key_claims.claim: UK Free and Go users receiving ads from June 4; paid plans remain ad-free
